shared_properties: Each overlay state occupies a centered 200x120 px panel suited to pause, fail, and clear transitions.
Core palette metadata remains primary #3B3347, background #0D0D0F, and accent #E07B39 while panel colors stay inside specs.colors_hex.
Panel framing leaves an internal safe text box of 176x88 px for titles, time readout, best-record callouts, and input hints.
differences: Paused state uses a restrained dark frame, game_over state adds rust-red damage accents, and escaped state elevates gate-gold highlights.
The panel atlas covers paused, game_over, and escaped without embedding any depth meter or floor count.
Title lockups are aligned for reuse with the shared 8 px font atlas and the 64x12 timer panel styling.

reference_images.label: gdd_markdown
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the paused, game-over, and clear screen flow, 200x120 panel size, and the requirement to show survival time and best record without a progress bar.

reference_images.label: moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the moody dungeon UI framing so overlays stay consistent with the shaft tone while still highlighting fail and clear states.

reference_images.label: player_concept
reference_images.purpose: Grounds player-facing status feedback so pause, fail, and escape panels are readable and emotionally distinct.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: ImageBundle for static HUD art and SpriteSheetBundle for multi-state overlays and gauges that swap atlas indices.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load UI textures during the shared Loading state and store handles in a HudVisualRegistry keyed by asset_key so gameplay systems never parse filenames.
runtime_notes: Anchor UI nodes to whole pixels in the 1280x720 output space while the gameplay layer is upscaled from 320x180.
Keep the friction gauge, HP strip, and timer on a dedicated HUD layer above parallax and hazard sprites.
Swap overlay states by atlas index or visibility flags instead of rebuilding UI trees during pause, fail, or clear transitions.

context.usage: Central overlay atlas for pause menu, game-over summary, and escape result panel.

acceptance_criteria: State sheet is exactly 600x120 px with 3 frames of 200x120 px and 0 px spacing.
Paused, game_over, and escaped states are visually distinct through dark, rust-red, and gate-gold accent dominance respectively.
No frame includes a progress bar, floor counter, or minimap element; only panel framing and status decoration are authored.
